entries.title: Sith Threat Is Political and Personal

content.fact: The One Sith threaten both galactic institutions and individual identity, especially Cade’s lineage and Krayt’s body/ideology.
content.injection: Balance Sith empire-scale politics with intimate temptation, injury, and identity pressure.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Darth Krayt's reign.
Respect story-position bounds from Darth Krayt's Sith Empire Reign to Darth Krayt's Apparent Death.
